note: Direct 1:1; Pink Sheet maize is US No.2 yellow Gulf grain price.
US Hard Red Winter is the standard global wheat benchmark (Kansas City); US SRW left aside as the secondary contract.
Thai white rice 5% broken is the standard global rice benchmark; Thai 25%/A.1 and Vietnamese 5% left aside.
Direct 1:1; whole-bean price chosen over the soybean_oil and soybean_meal derivatives.
SPAM splits coffee into arabica (coff) and robusta (rcof); arabica maps to the arabica (ICO/Other Milds) benchmark.
Robusta SPAM crop maps to the robusta benchmark.
Composite average of Colombo/Kolkata/Mombasa auctions chosen over any single-auction series.
Cotlook A Index is the standard global raw-cotton lint benchmark.
World (ISA) raw-sugar price; EU and US protected prices left aside.
US import banana price; Europe series left aside as the secondary regional benchmark.
Oilpalm fruit maps to crude palm oil (Malaysia); palm_kernel_oil is a separate co-product left aside.
Ribbed Smoked Sheet No.3 is the conventional natural-rubber benchmark; TSR20 block rubber left aside.
Whole-nut price chosen over groundnut_oil derivative.
Direct 1:1; US No.2 yellow Gulf sorghum.
Only tobacco benchmark in the Pink Sheet; US import unit value.
No raw-copra/coconut series exists; coconut oil is the closest single-commodity proxy for coconut output value.
